parameters.query:
INSERT INTO accounts (bank, identifier)
VALUES ('{{ $json.bank }}', '{{ $json.identifier }}')ON CONFLICT (bank, identifier) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO merchant_mcc_cache (
    merchant_normalized,
    merchant_original,
    mcc_code,
    mcc_description,
    category
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.normalize_merchant }}',
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.merchant }}',
    NULLIF('{{ $json.MCC || '' }}', ''),
    NULLIF('{{ $json.Category || '' }}', ''),
    NULLIF('{{ $json.Category || '' }}', '')
)
ON CONFLICT (merchant_normalized) DO UPDATE
SET merchant_original = EXCLUDED.merchant_original,
    mcc_code = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.mcc_code, merchant_mcc_cache.mcc_code),
    mcc_description = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.mcc_description, merchant_mcc_cache.mcc_description),
    category = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.category, merchant_mcc_cache.category),
    updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO merchant_mcc_cache (
    merchant_normalized,
    merchant_original,
    mcc_code,
    mcc_description,
    category
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.normalize_merchant }}',
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.merchant }}',
    NULLIF('{{ $('GetFromMCCSim').item.json.mcc_code || '' }}', ''),
    NULLIF('{{ $('GetFromMCCSim').item.json.mcc_description || '' }}', ''),
    NULLIF('{{ $('GetFromMCCSim').item.json.category || $('GetFromMCCSim').item.json.mcc_description || '' }}', '')
)
ON CONFLICT (merchant_normalized) DO UPDATE
SET merchant_original = EXCLUDED.merchant_original,
    mcc_code = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.mcc_code, merchant_mcc_cache.mcc_code),
    mcc_description = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.mcc_description, merchant_mcc_cache.mcc_description),
    category = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.category, merchant_mcc_cache.category),
    updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;
SELECT id, card_alias FROM accounts WHERE identifier = '{{ $json.identifier }}' AND bank = '{{ $json.bank }}';

INSERT INTO transactions (
    account_id,
    merchant_id,
    merchant,
    amount,
    currency,
    amount_base_currency,
    base_currency,
    category,
    mcc_code,
    transaction_timestamp,
    transaction_hash
)
VALUES (
    {{ $json.id }},
    {{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.merchant_id }},
    '{{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.merchant }}',
    {{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.amount }},
    '{{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.currency }}',
    {{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.amount_base_currency }},
    '{{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.fx_fallback_used ? $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.currency : 'SGD' }}',
    '{{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.Category }}',
    '{{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.MCC }}',
    '{{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.time }}',
    '{{ $('ConvertCurrencyIfNeeded').item.json.transaction_hash }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (transaction_hash) DO UPDATE
SET transaction_hash = transactions.transaction_hash  -- dummy update to trigger RETURNING
RETURNING *;

SELECT *,
       similarity('{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.normalize_merchant }}', merchant_normalized) AS sim
FROM merchant_mcc_cache WHERE similarity('{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.normalize_merchant }}', merchant_normalized) > 0.4
ORDER BY sim DESC
LIMIT 1;
